steps.title: Compute the cutoff list
steps.content:
All four answer choices use $x=3$, $5$, and $7$. Compute the boundary value $6x+2$ for each:
$$6(3)+2=20$$
$$6(5)+2=32$$
$$6(7)+2=44$$

steps.title: Compare choice C in one row
steps.content: Choice C has $y$-values $16$, $28$, and $40$. Each one is strictly below the matching cutoff: $16\lt20$, $28\lt32$, and $40\lt44$.

steps.title: Eliminate the others
steps.content: Choice A fails because $(3,20)$ is on the boundary, not less than it. Choice B fails because $(5,36)$ is above the allowed cutoff $32$. Choice D fails immediately at $(3,24)$. Only choice C has all three $y$-values below their cutoffs, so C is correct.
